headline: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) Stock After 43% Slide Is The Valuation Reset Enough
summary: If you are wondering whether Verisk Analytics at around US$173.80 is starting to look interesting on price, this article walks through the key valuation checks that matter most. The stock has fallen about 5.4% over the past week and around 21.4% year to date, with a decline of 42.7% over the past 12 months. This may have changed how investors view both its potential and its risks. Recent coverage of Verisk Analytics has focused on the stock's sharp share price pullback and what it could mean...

headline: Verisk (VRSK) Buys AccuLynx, SuranceBay, And Simplitium To Build Subscription Analytics
summary: Verisk Analytics (NasdaqGS:VRSK) has recently acquired AccuLynx, SuranceBay, and Simplitium Limited. The acquisitions focus on expanding the company's data and analytics capabilities across insurance and related markets. These deals support Verisk's emphasis on a subscription based revenue model for its analytics offerings. Verisk Analytics operates as a data and analytics provider for insurance and other risk focused industries, where accurate information and workflow tools are central to...
